zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood於1429年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood26歲，母親Margaret Borthwick16歲。他於大約1446年與Janet Boyd在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年在蘇格蘭享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾內瓦可 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood于1429年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood26岁，母亲Margaret Borthwick16岁。他于大约1446年与Janet Boyd在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年在苏格兰享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾內瓦可 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood was born in 1429, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Borthwick, was 16. He married Janet Boyd about 1446, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1490, in Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood est né en 1429, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Borthwick, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Janet Boyd environ 1446, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1490, à Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Écosse.

de.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood 1429 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Borthwick 16. Er hat um 1446 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Boyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood è nato il nel 1429 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Borthwick, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Janet Boyd circa 1446, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Maxwell of Calderwoodが1429年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir John Maxwell of Calderwoodは26歳，母Margaret Borthwickは16歳であった。約1446年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックでJanet Boydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年にスコットランドで61歳で死去し，スコットランドセルキルクシュアイアニューアルク カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood(이)가 1429년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Borthwick(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 Janet Boyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 스컷랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 뉴아르크 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood nasceu em 1429, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Borthwick, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Boyd aproximadamente 1446, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1490, em Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

ru.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood родился в 1429 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Borthwick, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Boyd около 1446 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности нюарк кастл, селкиркшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Janet Boyd aproximadamente 1446, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1490, en Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Newark Castle, Selkirkshire, Scotland.
